title: trichophyllum obtusum
intro: Trichophyllum obtusum, also known as the obtuse moss, is a species of moss that belongs to the family Hypnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Trichophyllum obtusum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, among others. In herbal preparations, Trichophyllum obtusum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
